network.tdh.hero.title: TDH
network.tdh.hero.intro: TDH (Total Days Held) is 6529's time-weighted holding metric. Each eligible NFT contributes value based on how long it has been held, then edition-size weighting and collection boosters adjust the result.
network.tdh.how.title: How TDH is calculated
network.tdh.how.intro: The calculation moves through three layers. Each layer builds on the result before it.
network.tdh.how.unweighted.title: Count unweighted days
network.tdh.how.unweighted.body: Each NFT contributes 1 for every day it is held.
network.tdh.how.edition.title: Apply edition weighting
network.tdh.how.edition.body: Scale held days by edition size, using FirstGM's {editionSize} editions as the 1.0 baseline.
network.tdh.how.edition.caption: Edition weighting examples
network.tdh.how.boosters.title: Apply collection boosters
network.tdh.how.boosters.body: Boosters are based on the sets and Gradients a holder owns.
network.tdh.how.boosters.rule: Use the higher of Category A or Category B, then add Category C.
network.tdh.current.title: TDH 1.4
network.tdh.current.intro: Category A and Category B are alternative booster paths. Use whichever is higher, then add the Category C booster.
network.tdh.current.map.title: The active rule at a glance
network.tdh.current.map.categoryCValue: Gradient booster, applied after the Category A or B comparison
network.tdh.current.categoryA.label: Category A
network.tdh.current.categoryA.title: Complete Meme Card sets
network.tdh.current.categoryA.completeSe: One complete set of all Meme Cards
network.tdh.current.categoryA.additional: Each additional complete set adds a diminishing boost to total TDH. There is no cap.
network.tdh.current.categoryA.formulaAri: Additional set boost equals 0.05 multiplied by 0.6529 to the power of n minus 1.
network.tdh.current.categoryA.formulaNot: n is the number of the additional complete set.
network.tdh.current.categoryA.maximumTit: Maximum theoretical Category A boost · infinite sets
network.tdh.current.categoryB.label: Category B
network.tdh.current.categoryB.title: Season sets
network.tdh.current.categoryB.applies: Category B is applied to total TDH, not only to TDH from that season.
network.tdh.current.categoryC.label: Category C
network.tdh.current.categoryC.title: Gradients
network.tdh.current.categoryC.limit: Applied per Gradient, up to a maximum of {count}.
network.tdh.related.title: Continue exploring TDH
network.tdh.related.intro: Use these references to compare older rules, clarify terms, or see how TDH appears across the network.
network.tdh.related.historic.title: Historic boosts
network.tdh.related.historic.description: Review TDH 1.1 through 1.3 and their effective dates.
network.tdh.related.definitions.title: Definitions
network.tdh.related.definitions.descript: Clarify the TDH, set, and network terms used in this guide.
network.tdh.related.stats.title: Network TDH stats
network.tdh.related.stats.description: See aggregate community activity, holdings, and time-based metrics.
network.tdh.related.levels.title: Levels
network.tdh.related.levels.description: See how TDH and REP combine in the network's progression model.
